calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Lizbeth R. Gordon, Esq. appeared on behalf of the plaintiff and Defendant, Sam Youmtoub appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of the parties on the record. Trial date is vacated.
